data.title: Comstock Holding Companies welcomes The Venardos Circus to Loudoun Station’s Summerbration with performances through Sept 28.
data.description: A well-known company in asset management, development, and operation of mixed-use properties in Washington, D.C. region, Comstock Holding Companies, Inc. (Nasdaq: CHCI), disclosed that The Venardos Circus, an animal-free circus similar to Broadway style, is currently ongoing at Loudoun Station. The circus showcases performances until September 28 and was established by Kevin Venardos, an ex-Ringling Bros. Ringmaster. The circus provides a unique entertainment experience for audiences.

data.title: SEGG Media highlights women in racing at Radical Cup UK Round 6. #empoweringwomen
data.description: The company reported a net profit of $50 million for the fiscal year, marking a significant increase of 25% compared to the previous year. The revenue for the year stood at $500 million, showing a growth of 15% from the year before. This notable performance was driven by strong sales in both domestic and international markets. The company's stock price also saw a positive trend, rising by 10% following the release of the financial reports. The CEO expressed satisfaction with the results and attributed the success to strategic investments in new technologies and expansion into emerging markets. Looking ahead, the company aims to further capitalize on its momentum and drive continued growth in the upcoming quarters.

data.title: MiCA facing resistance as regulators contest passporting. EU crypto law aimed at market unification with a single license now criticized as diverging national approaches create regulatory uncertainty. #MiCA #EUcrypto
data.description: The European Union introduced a significant cryptocurrency regulation aiming to streamline the market under one license. However, within less than a year, varying national strategies have emerged, leading to concerns about regulatory arbitrage and ambiguity in the industry.

data.title: Abcourt acquires 0.5% NSR royalty and boosts loan financing with Nebari.
data.description: A new report reveals alarming numbers regarding the rise in greenhouse gas emissions. The data shows that global emissions have increased by 2.7% in the past year, reaching a total of 36.8 billion metric tons of carbon dioxide. This marks a significant setback in efforts to address climate change and emphasizes the urgent need for more sustainable practices. The report also highlights the uneven distribution of emissions, with China contributing the most at 28%, followed by the United States at 15%, and the European Union at 10%. Experts warn that immediate action is required to curb these escalating emissions and prevent further environmental damage.

data.title: Sunrise New Energy begins construction on $64M 20,000-ton graphite anode production line, expects $110M annual revenue.
data.description: Sunrise New Energy Co., Ltd. has started building a new 20,000-ton high-end graphite anode material production line in Zibo, China, with a total planned investment of $64 million. The facility will have an annual production capacity of 20,000 tons, aiming to meet the growing demand from lithium-ion battery manufacturers. Sunrise has seen significant revenue growth in recent years, reaching $64.99 million in 2024. The company expects graphite anode shipments to increase to 40,000-50,000 tons in 2025. The new production line is expected to contribute approximately $110 million in annual revenue and $16 million in profit upon reaching full production. The expansion aligns with the thriving lithium battery and energy storage industries, with favorable market trends and policy support driving growth. Sunrise aims to leverage these trends to enhance its market presence and capitalize on emerging opportunities.

data.title: Dream Residential REIT declares US$0.035 per unit monthly distribution (US$0.42 annualized) for September 2025. Payable on Oct 15.
data.description: In Toronto, Dream Residential Real Estate Investment Trust (TSX: DRR.U and TSX:DRR.UN) declared a monthly distribution of US$0.035 per unit (US$0.42 annually) for September 2025. This distribution is scheduled to be paid on October 15, 2025, to unitholders on record as of September 30, 2025. Dream Residential REIT is an unincorporated, open-ended real estate investment trust.

data.title: Dream Office REIT (TSX: D.UN) announces September 2025 monthly distribution of 8.333 cents per REIT Unit, Series A ($1.00 annualized). Payable on October 15, 2025 to unitholders as at September 30, 2025.
data.description: Dream Office REIT (TSX: D.UN) declared a monthly distribution for September 2025 of 8.333 cents per REIT Unit, Series A (“REIT A Units”) ($1.00 annualized). The distribution is set to be paid on October 15, 2025, to unitholders recorded as of September 30, 2025. Dream Office REIT, an open-ended real estate investment trust, is a prominent office landlord in downtown Toronto, overseeing over 4.0 million square feet of office properties in the area.

data.title: Dream Industrial REIT (DIR.UN) announces September 2025 distribution of 5.833 cents per unit (70 cents annually), payable on Oct 15, to shareholders as of September 30, 2025.
data.description: Dream Industrial REIT (TSX: DIR.UN) declared their September 2025 monthly distribution of 5.833 cents per unit (equivalent to 70 cents annually). The payment is set for October 15, 2025, for unitholders recorded as of September 30, 2025. Dream Industrial REIT manages a diverse global portfolio of industrial properties. As of June 30, 2025, they have a stake in a significant number of these properties.

data.title: SEALSQ to launch Quantum Shield QS7001 in mid-November, leading in Post-Quantum Cryptography. NASDAQ: LAES.
data.description: On September 19, 2025, in Geneva, Switzerland, SEALSQ Corp (NASDAQ: LAES) revealed its intention to introduce the Quantum Shield QS7001 by mid-November 2025. SEALSQ, a leading company in Semiconductors, PKI, and Post-Quantum technology products, specializes in developing and marketing hardware and software. The Quantum Shield QS7001 is set to mark a significant advancement in their product line.

data.title: Precision Biologics will reveal efficacy of new ADC against human ovarian cancer at AACR conference. (characters: 94)
data.description: Bethesda-based Precision Biologics, Inc. announced on September 19, 2025, that their innovative Antibody-Drug Conjugate (ADC) PB-223 (PB-vcMMAE-5) has demonstrated promising effectiveness in both in vitro and in vivo studies. This novel treatment utilizes an anti-core 2 O-glycans anti-human carcinoma monoclonal antibody and has shown efficacy against human ovarian cancer cells that express truncated core 2 O-glycans. The results of the study highlight the potential of this treatment in targeting and combating ovarian cancer.
